name: Qwen2.5-Coder
metaDescription: Qwen2.5-Coder (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2024-11 — part of the Qwen-Coder line. Code models from 0.5B to 32B; the 32B was a leading open coding model of its ge…
overview: Qwen2.5-Coder is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Coder line. Released 2024-11. Open-weight code-specialised models tuned for agentic coding, repository-scale context, and tool use.
What's notable in this version: Code models from 0.5B to 32B; the 32B was a leading open coding model of its generation.
